textByHashes.1d3258cfb19f2e06cf922742de91e83891de1dc9: I can't talk now. Can't you see we're trying to win a battle here?
textByHashes.e29284089d3d26d280c78b558ec865d085eaf6f9: I managed to get one, although it wasn't easy.
textByHashes.8cc8b9f27819e769f84df6d4de687e74c36df80d: The other two tracker gnomes should have the other coordinates if they're still alive.
textByHashes.6100276fc5439b4f6cbf1463515bb285689893bc: Well done, you've broken down their defences. This battle must be ours.
textByHashes.aa16ec0fa3a985ff741db6ac3735116d02acd2d3: Now we have the orb I'm much better. They won't stand a chance without it.
textByHashes.828c34596c5f8cd86c25d9311145cb149f27e9c8: When will this battle end? I feel like I've been fighting forever.
